sections.paragraph:
Original: פּו פּא פּה

Transliteration: pôh pô' pô

Phonetic: po

BDB Definition:

  1. here, from here, hither
    1. here
    2. hither

Origin: probably from a primitive inseparable particle "p" (of demonstrative force) and H1931

TWOT entry: 1739

Part(s) of speech: Adverb
